content.text:
The President of Germany is **Frank-Walter Steinmeier**. He has served in this role since March 2017 and was re-elected for a second term in February 2022.

As a point of clarification, Germany's President serves as the head of state, but this is largely a ceremonial role. The head of government—who holds the primary executive power—is the Chancellor, currently **Friedrich Merz**, who took office in May 2025.

Since my information may not reflect the most recent developments, I'd recommend verifying with a current source if you need up-to-date confirmation.
